task_objective: Fix report portability and CORS errors for local files
design_decisions: Switched from ES modules (esm.sh) to UMD builds (unpkg.com) to support opening reports via file:// protocol.
Added 'window.react = window.React' alias to satisfy Lucide-React v0.292.0 UMD requirements.
Removed 'data-type=module' from Babel script tags to avoid CORS and module restrictions on local files.
Updated React mounting to use global ReactDOM variable directly.
results: Reports now render correctly when opened as local files in Edge and other modern browsers. E2E frontend tests pass. Release v0.1.9 published.
